notes: Audit fixes C1 + C2 + C3 (batched on top of deployed v1.6.61). Safe no-op (inventory-only, as before) when no active deployment / low confidence / no or multiple ledger matches; deploy_updateOpticCount unchanged (still logs OPTIC_DISPENSED + OPTIC_INSTALLED audit entries + over-pull warning). No CSS, no sw.js logic change (stamp only).
